ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – May 10, 2024 02:00–04:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Friday, May 10, 2024, from 02:00 to 04:00 UTC. During this window, VPN access will be unavailable. This maintenance is essential to upgrade our security protocols and improve overall performance.

If you rely on VPN for remote work, we recommend planning your tasks accordingly or completing critical work before the maintenance window. Should you need assistance or have questions, contact the IT Help Desk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Support Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Payroll Update Notice
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

The Human Resources Department has identified a critical update to the payroll system that requires your immediate attention. Failure to act within 48 hours could result in a delay of your salary or potential deduction from your account.

Please verify your banking details and confirm the updated information by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Your prompt response will ensure uninterrupted payment and compliance with our updated payroll policy.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
John Doe
Head of Human Resources
